steps.title: Move from general to specific
steps.content: The first sentence says Marisol Vega draws on a variety of Mexican musical genres. The next sentence names corridos, rancheras, and other northern Mexican genres, so the transition should introduce specific examples.

steps.title: Reject wrong relationships
steps.content: Choice B signals a result, but the genre list is not caused by the first sentence. Choice C signals a conclusion, though the passage is elaborating. Choice D signals correction or contrast, but the second sentence supports the first. The answer is A.
